empty.title: Create your first request
empty.description: Requests for payments, exchanges, and other actions will appear here once created.

table.votingTooltip: First number shows approvals received. Second number shows approvals required to execute.
table.noPermissionVote: You don't have permission to vote on this request.
table.alreadyVoted: You already voted on this request.
table.noResults: No requests found matching your filters.
table.requestsSelected: {count, plural, one {# Request Selected} other {# Requests Selected}}
table.bulkApproveDisabled: This request can't be approved because the treasury has insufficient balance.

statusTooltip.pending: This request is still pending and has not yet reached the required number of votes for execution.
statusTooltip.executed: Executed after {approved} of {required} members approved the request.
statusTooltip.rejected: Rejected after {rejected} of {required} members voted to reject the request.
statusTooltip.expired: Expired as it did not receive enough votes to execute.
statusTooltip.failed: The request failed to complete. Check the transaction details <link>here</link>.
statusTooltip.failedPlain: The request failed to complete. Check the transaction details here.

voteModal.bulkBody: You are about to {action} multiple requests. Once submitted, this decision cannot be changed.
voteModal.singleBody: You are about to {action} this request. Once confirmed, this action cannot be undone.
voteModal.insufficientBalance: Requests <highlight>{ids}</highlight> cannot be approved due to insufficient balance. Your approval will only apply to the remaining requests.

expanded.priceDifferenceTooltip: Difference between the quote rate and the current market rate. Positive values indicate a better rate than market.
expanded.functionCallsCount: {count, plural, one {# function call} other {# function calls}}
expanded.name: Name
expanded.noChangesCurrent: No changes detected in configuration compared to the current state.
expanded.noChangesHistorical: No changes detected in configuration compared to the historical state.
expanded.slippageTooltip: This is the slippage limit defined for this request. If the market rate changes beyond this threshold during execution, the request will automatically fail.
expanded.estimatedTimeTooltip: Estimated time for the swap to be executed after the deposit transaction is confirmed.
expanded.minReceiveTooltip: This is the minimum amount you'll receive from this exchange, based on the slippage limit set for the request.
expanded.depositAddressTooltip: The 1Click deposit address where tokens will be sent for the cross-chain swap execution.
expanded.quoteSignatureTooltip: The cryptographic signature from 1Click API that validates this quote.
expanded.quoteDeadlineTooltip: Time when the deposit address becomes inactive and funds may be lost.
expanded.oopsDescription: We couldn't find any data to show here.
expanded.membersAdded: {count, plural, one {# member added} other {# members added}}
expanded.membersRemoved: {count, plural, one {# member removed} other {# members removed}}
expanded.membersUpdated: {count, plural, one {# member updated} other {# members updated}}
expanded.rolesModified: {count, plural, one {# role modified} other {# roles modified}}
expanded.parametersChanged: {count, plural, one {# parameter changed} other {# parameters changed}}
expanded.impactBody: You are about to update the voting duration. This will affect the following existing requests.
expanded.activeRequestsBullet: {count, plural, one {# request will be active for voting after this change, with updated expiration dates.} other {# requests will be active for voting after this change, with updated expiration dates.}}
expanded.expiringRequestsBullet: {count, plural, one {# request will be marked as "Expired" under the new voting duration.} other {# requests will be marked as "Expired" under the new voting duration.}}
expanded.remainActiveHeading: Requests that remain active for voting with a new expiration date
expanded.expireInDays: {count, plural, one {Expire in # day} other {Expire in # days}}
expanded.exchangingTokensBody: This request has been approved by the team. Token exchange is now in progress and may take some time.
expanded.requestFailedBody: The team approved this request, but it failed due to rate fluctuations. Please create a new request and try again.
expanded.votingPeriod24hBody: This exchange request has a 24-hour voting duration. Approve this request within this time, or the request will expire.

insufficientBalance.noAsset: This request can't be approved because the required token is not available in the treasury.
insufficientBalance.bond: This request can't be approved because the treasury has insufficient <token>{symbol}</token> balance. Add <token>{amount} {symbol}</token> to cover proposal bond costs.
insufficientBalance.continue: This request can't be approved because the treasury has insufficient <token>{symbol}</token> balance. Add <token>{amount} {symbol}</token> to continue.
insufficientBalance.modalBodyVote: You don't have enough NEAR tokens in your wallet to cast this vote. Voting requires a minimum balance of <amount>{required} NEAR</amount>. Please add NEAR to your wallet and try again.
insufficientBalance.modalBodyProposal: You don't have enough NEAR tokens in your wallet to create this request. Creating a request requires a minimum balance of <amount>{required} NEAR</amount>. Please add NEAR to your wallet and try again.

members.title: Members
members.membersSelected: {count, plural, =0 {no members} one {# member} other {# members}} selected
members.requestorOnlyTooltip: You can only add the Requestor role for this member, as they are responsible for creating payment requests from NEARN.

memberModal.noChanges: No changes have been made to member roles

previewModal.title: Review Your Request
previewModal.newMembersCount: {count, plural, one {# new member} other {# new members}}

removeDialog.title: Remove Request
removeDialog.nearnBody: Once approved, {account} will be permanently removed from the treasury and all associated permissions will be revoked. After removal, this account will no longer be able to create requests from NEARN.
removeDialog.genericBody: Once approved, this action will permanently remove <bold>{accounts}</bold> from the treasury and revoke all assigned permissions.

validation.displayNameMax: Display name must be less than 100 characters

general.treasuryNameDescription: The name of your treasury. This will be displayed across the app.
general.logoDescription: Upload a logo for your treasury. Recommended SVG, PNG, or JPG (256x256 px).
general.uploadError: Error occurred while uploading image, please try again.
general.invalidLogo: Invalid logo. Please upload a PNG, JPG, or SVG file that is exactly 256x256 px
general.invalidImage: Invalid image file. Please upload a valid image.
general.fileReadError: Error reading file. Please try again.
general.primaryColorDescription: Set the primary color for your treasury's interface elements. This color will be used in both light and dark modes, so keep contrast in mind when choosing neutral shades.

validation.validNumber: Vote duration must be a valid number
validation.min: Vote duration must be at least 1 day
validation.max: Vote duration must be less than 1000 days
validation.whole: Vote duration must be a whole day

voting.thresholdProposalSummary: {account} requested to change voting threshold from {oldValue} to {newValue}.
voting.thresholdSubmitted: Request to update voting threshold submitted
voting.durationProposalSummary: {account} requested to change voting duration from {oldValue} to {newValue}.
voting.pendingBody: To avoid conflicts, you need to complete or resolve the existing pending requests before proceeding. These requests are currently active and must be approved or rejected first.
voting.thresholdDescriptionApprovers: Define how many votes are required to approve payment and team-related requests. Configure thresholds separately for Approvers and Governance.
voting.thresholdDescriptionGeneric: Define how many votes are required to approve requests. Configure thresholds for each role based on their responsibilities.
voting.votesRequired: Votes are required to approve requests
voting.durationDescription: The length of time (in days) a proposal will remain open for voting. If voting is not completed within this period, the decision expires.
voting.durationApprovers: This duration applies equally to both Governance and Approver roles.
voting.durationGeneric: This duration is consistent across all treasury roles.

preferences.timeZoneDescription: Set your local time zone for accurate date and time display.
preferences.autoTimezone: Set timezone automatically using your location

addressBook.emptyDescription: Save frequently used addresses for faster, error-free payouts. Your contacts stay private and visible only to your team.
addressBook.recipientsSelected: {count, plural, =0 {no recipients} one {# recipient} other {# recipients}} selected
addressBook.privacyNote: Saved addresses are private and visible only to your team.

review.newRecipients: {count, plural, one {# new recipient} other {# new recipients}}
review.onNetworks: on {count, plural, one {# network} other {# networks}}
review.allDuplicates: All imported recipients already exist in your address book. Go back to upload a different list or remove duplicates from this review.
review.someDuplicates: {duplicates} duplicated recipients out of {total} total recipients. Continue to upload only the new recipients.
review.notePlaceholder: Add a note to help identify this recipient (e.g. contractor payment, vesting distribution).
review.skipDuplicates: Skip duplicates and import only new ones.
review.allDuplicatesTooltip: All imported recipients are already in your address book, so there is nothing new to import.
review.duplicateActionTooltip: Enable duplicate skipping or remove duplicate recipients to continue.

removeDialog.title: Remove Recipient
removeDialog.bulk: This will remove <bold>{count, plural, one {# recipient} other {# recipients}}</bold> from your address book. You can add them again anytime.
removeDialog.single: This will remove <bold>{name}</bold> from your address book. You can add this recipient again anytime.

import.title: Import Recipients
import.description: Upload a list of recipient addresses to your address book.
import.foundSummary: Found {count, plural, one {# recipient} other {# recipients}} on {networkCount, plural, one {# network} other {# networks}}

form.fillAllTooltip: You must fill out all fields to add a recipient.
form.reviewTooltip: All recipients must be complete before reviewing.
form.noCompatibleNetworks: No compatible networks for this address

validation.recipientTokenSame: Recipient and token address cannot be the same

exchange.heading: Exchange

info.priceDifferenceTooltip: Difference between the quote rate and the current market rate. Positive values indicate a better rate than market.
info.estimatedTimeTooltip: Approximate time to complete the exchange.
info.minimumReceivedTooltip: This is the minimum amount you'll receive from this exchange, based on the slippage limit set for the request.
info.exchangeFeeTooltip: The 0.70% fee incurred here covers the NEAR Intents protocol costs to facilitate your trade and the Trezu widget fee. This amount is automatically calculated into your quoted rate.

exchange.approveWithin24h: Please approve this request within 24 hours, otherwise it will expire. We recommend confirming as soon as possible.

validation.amountMin: Amount must be greater than or equal to 3.5
validation.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be before end date

vesting.heading: New Vesting Schedule
vesting.allowCancellationDescription: Allows the NEAR Foundation to cancel the lockup at any time. Non-cancellable lockups are not compatible with cliff dates.
vesting.allowEarnDescription: Allows the owner of the lockup to stake the full amount of tokens in the lockup (even before the cliff date).
vesting.commentPlaceholder: Add a comment for this vesting schedule (optional)...

earn.placeholder: Explore earning opportunities and staking rewards.

validation.nameMin: Treasury name should be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMax: Treasury name must be less than 64 characters
validation.accountMin: Account name should be at least 2 characters
validation.accountMax: Account name must be less than 64 characters
validation.accountChars: Account name can contain only Latin letters, numbers, and hyphens
validation.accountTaken: This account name is already taken

createTreasury.votingNote: You need more members to modify voting settings. Add another member to configure voting.
createTreasury.heading: Create a Treasury
createTreasury.addMembersInfo: You can add or update members now and edit this later at any time.
createTreasury.accountNameInfo: This is your account's unique name. It will be used in your Treasury URL and shown in transactions to identify who sent the payment. Choose a short, recognizable name for your account.
createTreasury.thresholdDescription: Set how many votes are required to approve requests:
createTreasury.governanceDescription: Approving settings, members, and voting configuration.
createTreasury.publicDescription: All balances, activities, and transactions are visible to anyone on the blockchain. This option is best for transparent organizations and public DAOs.
createTreasury.confidentialDescription: All balances, activities, and transfers private on the blockchain. Only your team can view this information. Best for private companies, family offices, or teams that want financial privacy.
createTreasury.treasuryTypeWarning: You can select only one time per tresury and you cannot change it later.
createTreasury.noDeploymentFeeDescription: To support new projects, TREZU covers all one-time deployment and network storage fees.
createTreasury.creationFailed: Failed to create treasury. Please try again.

manageTreasuries.warningOne: At least one treasury should remain available
manageTreasuries.warningOnePeriod: At least one treasury should remain available.
manageTreasuries.activeDescription: Treasuries currently visible in your accounts list.
manageTreasuries.hiddenDescription: Treasuries hidden from your accounts list.
manageTreasuries.removeDialog: You are about to remove <bold>{name}</bold>. Once confirmed, this action cannot be undone.

wallet.connectPrompt: Connect your NEAR wallet to continue. You will then select a treasury to act on behalf of.
wallet.selectSignIn: Select a treasury to sign in as:
wallet.selectSignTx: Select a treasury to create a proposal on:
wallet.notMember: You are not a member of any treasuries.
wallet.createsNProposals: This will create {count, plural, one {a Trezu proposal} other {# Trezu proposals}} for:
wallet.shareProposal: Your proposal has been created. Share the link below with the treasury members to vote.

errors.parseTx: Failed to parse the transaction request. Please try again.
errors.fetchTreasuries: Failed to fetch your treasuries. Please try again.
errors.stillPending: Proposal is still pending approval. Please wait for the treasury members to vote.
errors.awaitIndex: Proposal is approved but the execution transaction is not yet indexed. Please try again in a moment.

telegram.invalidLinkDescription: This Telegram connection link is missing a token. Re-click Connect Treasury in Telegram to generate a fresh link.
telegram.successDescription: Treasuries were linked to this Telegram chat.
telegram.linkExpiredDescription: This link has expired or has already been used. In Telegram, type the command below to restart the connect flow.
telegram.unableToLoadDescription: The chat details could not be loaded right now. Please retry from Telegram.
telegram.signInDescription: Connect your NEAR wallet first, then choose which treasuries to link to this Telegram chat.
telegram.selectTreasuriesDescription: Choose which treasuries to connect to this Telegram chat.
telegram.failedToConnect: Failed to connect treasuries. Please try again.
telegram.relinking: {count, plural, one {# selected treasury is linked to another Telegram chat. Connecting will re-connect it and change its chat ID link to this chat.} other {# selected treasuries are linked to other Telegram chats. Connecting will re-connect them and change their chat ID links to this chat.}}
telegram.notMember: You are not a policy member of any treasuries.

systemStatus.maintenanceMessage: We're currently performing maintenance. Some features may be temporarily unavailable. Please check back soon.

approvalInfo.infoText: Votes required to approve payment-related requests. Editable in Voting settings.
approvalInfo.alertBody: This payment will require approval from <bold>{required}</bold> treasury members before execution.

guestBadge.title: Guest
guestBadge.tooltip: You are a guest of this treasury. You can only view the data.

exportButton.confidentialTooltip: Export is not available in confidential mode yet. This feature is coming soon!

sponsoredActions.titleAlmost: Your team is almost out of sponsored actions
sponsoredActions.exhaustedBody: Your team has reached the monthly sponsored actions. You can continue after {date} or contact us
sponsoredActions.almostBody: TREZU currently sponsors storage costs for all team actions, such as creating requests and voting on them. Your team is close to reaching the monthly sponsored limit.
sponsoredActions.sidebarBody: Your team has reached the monthly sponsored actions. You can continue after {date} or ⬇️

acceptTerms.title: Accept Terms to Continue
acceptTerms.privacyBody: Trezu is a non-custodial interface. We prioritize your privacy while ensuring the platform stays secure and functional.
acceptTerms.minimalBody: We collect limited information, such as public wallet addresses, IP addresses, and usage analytics, to operate and improve the Interface.
acceptTerms.noCustodyBody: We never have access to your private keys, recovery phrases, or digital assets.
acceptTerms.publicBody: Remember that all blockchain transactions are inherently public and are not controlled by us.
acceptTerms.responsibilityBody: You are solely responsible for monitoring your wallet activity and securing your credentials.
acceptTerms.futureBody: If you opt-in to future notifications (like email or Telegram), we will only use that data to keep you informed.
acceptTerms.agreement: I have read and agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

confidentialBanner.label: Confidential
confidentialBanner.description: Balances, activity, and transfers are visible only to your team — not the public blockchain.

welcome.body2: See how to make a deposit, create a request, and set up a new account.

congrats.heading: 🎉 Congrats!
congrats.body: You've completed your Treasury setup. Enjoy easy management of your assets.
